observation:
Action: look around
You are in the street. To the East you see a closed commercial glass door. To the West you see the backyard.

Action: look around
You are in the backyard. To the North you see a closed patio door. To the South you see a closed sliding patio door. To the East you see the street. Through an open patio door, to the West you see the kitchen.

Action: look around
You are in the kitchen. To the North you see a closed wood door. To the South you see a closed wood door. To the East you see a closed patio door. To the West you see a closed plain door.

Action: look around
You open the patio door, revealing the backyard.

Action: look around
You open the wood door, revealing the corridor.

Action: look around
You are in the backyard. To the North you see a closed patio door. To the South you see a closed sliding patio door. To the East you see the street. Through an open patio door, to the West you see the kitchen.

Action: look around
You are in the kitchen. To the North you see a closed wood door. To the South you see a closed wood door. To the East you see a closed patio door. To the West you see a closed plain door.
